name: MaxDouble
expected: ['list.sort((a, b)=>a - b).reverse()[0]', 'list.sort((n1, n2) => n1 - n2).pop()', 'list.sort((a, b)=>a - b).pop()', 'list.sort((a, b)=>a - b)[list.length - 1]', 'list.sort((a, b)=>a - b)[-1 + list.length]']

name: IsAllPositive
expected: ['0 < arr.sort((a, b)=>a - b).shift()', '0 < arr.sort((a, b)=>a - b)[0]']

name: IsIncreasing
expected: ["arr.join('') === arr.sort((a, b)=>a - b).join('')", "arr.join(',') === arr.sort((a, b)=>a - b).join(',')"]

name: MaxAndMin
expected: ['arr.sort((a, b)=>a - b[0] + arr.reverse()[0]', 'arr.sort((a, b)=>a - b[0] + arr.pop()']

name: MaxAndMinWithN
expected: ['arr.sort((a, b)=>a - b)[0] + arr.reverse()[0]', 'arr.sort((a, b)=>a - b)[0] + arr.pop()']
